message.content:
Explore the project at C:\Users\User\citedby-ai thoroughly. I need to understand:
1. The full directory structure (all files and folders)
2. What tech stack is used (React, Next.js, Vue, etc.)
3. Where the landing page / main page components are
4. What styling system is used (Tailwind, CSS modules, etc.)
5. The existing color scheme and design tokens
6. The package.json to understand dependencies
7. Any existing layout, navbar, footer components
8. The routing structure

Be very thorough - read package.json, config files (tailwind.config, next.config, vite.config, etc.), and the main page/layout files.

content.content:
{"content":" CitedBy.ai — AEO Intelligence Platform
"}
{"content":"[FILE] page.tsx"}

{"content":"# CitedBy.ai - SaaS AEO Platform

Full Stack SaaS application for AI Visibility Monitoring.

## Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **AI**: Google Gemini (via @google/genai)
- **Billing**: Stripe

## Getting Started

1. **Install dependencies**
   ```bash
   npm install
   ```

2. **Environment Variables**
   Copy `.env.example` to `.env.local` and fill in your keys.
   - You need a Supabase project.
   - You need a Google AI Studio API Key.

3. **Run Development Server**
   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```

## MVP Features Implemented
- Authentication UI (Login/Register)
- Dashboard Layout with Sidebar
- Projects Management (List/Create)
- AI Monitoring Run Simulation (API Route)
- Scoring Logic (Brand/URL/Competitor detection)
- Gemini Integration (Mocked fallback if no key)

## Project Structure
- `app/(app)`: Protected dashboard routes
- `app/(auth)`: Authentication routes
- `app/(public)`: Landing page
- `app/api`: Backend API routes
- `lib`: Utilities, AI provider, Scoring logic

## Deployment
Deploy on Vercel and connect your Supabase project.
"}

content.text:
Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me compile the final report:

## Project Exploration Report: CitedBy.ai

### 1. **FULL DIRECTORY STRUCTURE**

```
C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\
├── app/                           # Next.js App Router
│   ├── (app)/                     # Protected dashboard routes (post-login)
│   │   └── app/
│   │       ├── layout.tsx         # Dashboard wrapper layout
│   │       ├── page.tsx           # Main dashboard home
│   │       └── projects/
│   │           ├── [id]/
│   │           │   ├── layout.tsx
│   │           │   └── overview/page.tsx
│   │           └── page.tsx
│   ├── (auth)/                    # Authentication routes
│   │   ├── layout.tsx
│   │   ├── login/
│   │   └── register/
│   ├── (public)/                  # Public landing page
│   │   └── page.tsx               # Main landing page
│   ├── api/                       # Backend API routes
│   │   ├── runs/
│   │   └── stripe/
│   ├── layout.tsx                 # Root layout with fonts and metadata
│   └── globals.css
├── components/                    # React components
│   ├── layout/
│   │   ├── AppShell.tsx           # Main app container
│   │   ├── AppSidebar.tsx
│   │   ├── PageHeader.tsx
│   │   └── TopNav.tsx
│   ├── ui/                        # UI components
│   │   ├── Badge.tsx
│   │   ├── CreditBar.tsx
│   │   └── KPICard.tsx
│   ├── Navbar.tsx                 # Top navigation with user menu
│   ├── AppFooter.tsx              # Footer component
│   ├── Sidebar.tsx                # Sidebar navigation
│   ├── MobileBottomNav.tsx        # Mobile bottom navigation
│   └── [Other component files]
├── pages/                         # Page-level logic (pre-layout components)
│   ├── Home.tsx                   # Landing page content
│   ├── Login.tsx
│   ├── Analyze.tsx
│   ├── Dashboard.tsx
│   ├── Projects.tsx
│   ├── Account.tsx
│   ├── Directory.tsx
│   └── [20+ other page modules]
├── lib/                           # Utilities & business logic
│   ├── ai-provider.ts             # Google Gemini integration
│   ├── criteria-mapper.ts
│   ├── engine-score-calculator.ts
│   ├── scoring.ts
│   ├── stripe.ts
│   ├── utils.ts
│   └── supabase/
├── services/                      # API services
│   └── [Analysis, Database, etc.]
├── types.ts                       # TypeScript interfaces
├── i18n/                          # Internationalization
├── config/                        # Configuration files
├── src/                           # Legacy source files
│   ├── App.tsx                    # Legacy Vite app root (backup)
│   ├── components/
│   ├── hooks/
│   ├── pages/
│   ├── utils/
│   └── stores/
├── middleware.ts                  # Next.js middleware
├── vite.config.ts                 # Vite config (for legacy)
├── next.config.mjs                # Next.js config
├── tailwind.config.ts             # Tailwind CSS config
├── postcss.config.cjs             # PostCSS config
├── tsconfig.json                  # TypeScript config
├── package.json
├── index.html                     # Vite entry point (legacy)
├── index.tsx                      # Vite app entry (legacy)
├── App.tsx                        # Vite app root (legacy)
└── globals.css                    # Global Tailwind styles
```

---

### 2. **TECH STACK SUMMARY**

| Category | Technology |
|----------|------------|
| **Framework** | Next.js 14 (App Router) with TypeScript |
| **UI Library** | React 18 |
| **Styling** | TailwindCSS 3.4 + PostCSS |
| **Package Manager** | npm |
| **Runtime** | Node.js |
| **Backend/Database** | Supabase (PostgreSQL) with @supabase/ssr |
| **AI Integration** | Google Gemini via @google/genai |
| **Forms** | React Hook Form + Zod validation |
| **Icons** | Lucide React |
| **Payments** | Stripe |
| **Charts** | Recharts |
| **Routing** | React Router DOM (in legacy) + Next.js App Router (current) |
| **Notifications** | Sonner (toast system) |
| **PDF Export** | html2canvas + jspdf |
| **Build Tools** | Vite (legacy), Next.js (current) |
| **Testing** | Vitest, Testing Library, Jest |

---

### 3. **LANDING PAGE & MAIN COMPONENTS**

**Landing Page Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(public)\page.tsx`
- **Architecture:** Next.js (public route, no authentication required)
- **Features:**
  - Header with logo, login/register links
  - Hero section with gradient background and CTA buttons
  - Free AI Visibility Score audit tool (brand name + URL inputs)
  - Stats bar (4 metrics)
  - Features grid (3 tools)
  - SEO vs AEO comparison section
  - 3 Pillars of AI Authority
  - Process/journey section
  - Testimonials
  - FAQ section (collapsible)
  - Pricing section (3 plans: Le Jerrican, La Pompe, La Citerne)
  - Final CTA section

**Main Page Content Component:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\Home.tsx`
- Handles free audit form, audit results display, pricing cards
- Uses hooks for state management (brandName, siteUrl, isAnalyzing, auditResult)
- Integrates with `auditAnswerFirst()` service for free analysis

**Key Layout Components:**
- **TopNav** (`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\TopNav.tsx`) - Fixed top navigation with user menu, notifications, quick actions
- **AppShell** (`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\AppShell.tsx`) - Main dashboard container with sidebar/topnav dimensions
- **AppSidebar** (`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\AppSidebar.tsx`) - Navigation menu (sections & pages)
- **Navbar** (`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\Navbar.tsx`) - Authenticated user navbar with credits display
- **AppFooter** (`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\AppFooter.tsx`) - Global footer with links

---

### 4. **STYLING SYSTEM**

**System:** **Tailwind CSS** with custom configuration

**Tailwind Config** (`tailwind.config.ts`):
```typescript
darkMode: ["class"]
Colors:
  - primary: #7c3aed (purple)
  - leadradar brand colors:
    - bg: #0B0F1A
    - card: #111827
    - border: #1E293B
    - accent: #10B981 (emerald)
    - Various industry colors (immobilier, coaching, btp, burning, hot, warm, cold)
    - text: #F8FAFC
    - muted: #94A3B8

Font Families:
  - sans: Inter
  - serif: Playfair Display
  - outfit: Outfit

Custom Animations:
  - pulse-live: Pulsing scale animation
  - slide-in: Slide in from top
  
Keyframes:
  - pulseLive (0.45 → 1.0 → 0.45 opacity)
  - slideIn (translateY -8px → 0)
```

**Global Styles** (`globals.css`):
- `.btn-gradient` - Purple gradient button with hover effects
- `.gradient-text` - Gradient text effect (#7c3aed to #a855f7)
- `.ninja-card` - Dark card with border (rgba 0.06) and purple hover glow
- Custom scrollbars (thin dark style)
- Multiple animations (fade-in, zoom-in, slide-in-from-bottom, shimmer)
- Scroll progress bar (2px top, gradient purple-pink)
- Back-to-top button styling

---

### 5. **COLOR SCHEME & DESIGN TOKENS**

**Primary Colors:**
- **Primary Purple:** `#7c3aed` (main brand color)
- **Violet Gradient:** `#a855f7` to `#c084fc`
- **Dark Background:** `#0B0F1A` (almost black with blue tint)
- **Card Background:** `#111827` (slightly lighter)
- **Border:** `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)` to `0.15`

**Status Colors:**
- **Success/Emerald:** `#10B981`
- **Warning/Amber:** `#F59E0B`, `#F97316`
- **Error/Red:** `#EF4444`, `#f87171`
- **Info/Blue:** Various blues
- **Muted/Gray:** `#94A3B8`

**Text Colors:**
- **Primary Text:** `#F8FAFC` (light)
- **Secondary Text:** `#E2E8F0`
- **Muted:** `#94A3B8`, `#64748B`
- **Placeholder:** `#475569`

**Theme:** Dark mode (class-based), modern glassmorphism with backdrop blur

### 7. **NAVBAR, FOOTER & LAYOUT COMPONENTS**

**Top Navigation Bar** (`Navbar.tsx` - 550+ lines):
- Fixed position, height 56px (h-14)
- Dark background (`#0e0e18`) with subtle border
- **Left side:** Logo (CitedBy.ai with Zap icon), menu toggle
- **Center:** (Empty, logo only)
- **Right side (Authenticated):**
  - Language selector
  - Quick Actions dropdown (New Audit, New Client, etc.)
  - Notifications bell with dropdown panel
  - Credits badge with progress bar (amber color scheme)
  - User profile button with avatar + dropdown
    - Shows name, email, plan, credits
    - Account, Recharge, Search, Logout options
- **Right side (Not Authenticated):**
  - Language selector
  - Login button with gradient

**Footer** (`AppFooter.tsx`):
- Dark background (`#000`)
- 4-column grid (responsive):
  - Column 1: Logo + Tagline
  - Column 2: Product links
  - Column 3: AEO Resources
  - Column 4: Company info
- Copyright + trust badges (RGPD, SSL, 99.9% Uptime, 24/7 Support, Made in France)
- Opaque top border (white/5%)

**Main Layout System** (`AppShell.tsx`):
- **TopNav:** fixed, h-14 (56px), z-50, full width
- **Sidebar:** fixed, w-60 (240px), top-14, left-0, bottom-0, z-40
- **Main Content:** pt-14, md:pl-60, min-h-screen
  - **Inner Container:** p-6/p-8, h-[calc(100vh-56px)], overflow-y-auto (ONLY scrolling area)

**Sidebar Navigation** (`AppSidebar.tsx`):
- Collapsible on desktop (toggle button)
- Mobile menu overlay
- Two expandable sections:
  - **Optimization Tools** (Audit, Monitoring, Directory, etc.)
  - **Generative Tools** (Schema.org, llms.txt, Content Writer, etc.)

---

### 8. **ROUTING STRUCTURE**

**Architecture:** Hybrid - Next.js App Router + React legacy navigation

**Next.js Routes (App Router):**
```
/                           → Landing page (public)
/(public)/page.tsx          → Public landing
/(auth)/login               → Login page
/(auth)/register            → Register page
/(app)/app                  → Protected dashboard
/(app)/app/projects         → Projects list
/(app)/app/projects/[id]    → Project detail
/api/runs                   → Backend API
/api/stripe                 → Stripe webhook
```

**React Navigation (in App.tsx):**
- Client-side routing via `currentView` state
- 30+ views managed as string literals:
  - `home` → Landing/Dashboard
  - `analyze` → New Audit
  - `results` → Audit Results
  - `projects` → Monitoring AEO
  - `directory` → Public Directory
  - `dashboard` → User Dashboard
  - `account` → Account & Subscription
  - `recharge` → Credit Store
  - `generative-tools` → Tools Hub
  - [Plus 15+ more specialized tools]

**View History:** Stack-based navigation with `goBack()` support

---

### 9. **KEY FEATURES IDENTIFIED**

**Core Platform:**
1. **Free AI Visibility Audit** (on landing page)
2. **AEO Monitoring Dashboard** (Projects view)
3. **Generative Tools Suite:**
   - Schema.org code generator
   - llms.txt/llms.json generator
   - Content Writer (AI article/product description)
   - Reputation monitoring
   - Bot tracking
   - Blog optimizer
   - EEAT Builder

**Supporting Features:**
- Credit-based system (GTO Gas)
- User authentication (Login/Register)
- Subscription plans (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
- Stripe billing integration
- Directory/registry of optimized brands
- AI monitoring & alerting
- Content library management

### 10. **CONFIGURATION FILES**

**Next.js Config** (`next.config.mjs`):
- Image optimization (Google OAuth avatar support)
- Security headers (DENY X-Frame, CSP)
- Referrer Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

**TypeScript** (`tsconfig.json`):
- Target: ES2020
- Module: ESNext
- Strict mode enabled
- Paths: Root-relative imports supported

**PostCSS** (`postcss.config.cjs`):
- TailwindCSS plugin
- Autoprefixer plugin

---

### SUMMARY

**CitedBy.ai** is a modern **SaaS platform for AI visibility optimization** built with:
- **Next.js 14** (new App Router) for the main app
- **React 18** for UI
- **TailwindCSS** for styling (dark mode, purple theme)
- **Supabase** for database/auth
- **Google Gemini** for AI features
- **Stripe** for payments

The **landing page** is a compelling single-page site with a free audit tool, feature showcase, pricing, and FAQ. The **dashboard** uses a sidebar + top navigation layout for managing projects, running audits, and accessing generative tools.

Design is **modern dark theme** (almost black `#0B0F1A`) with **purple accent** (`#7c3aed`), **glassmorphism effects**, **smooth animations**, and **responsive design** (mobile-first with Tailwind breakpoints).

All absolute file paths are provided above for your reference.
